parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_UicCmd instance.

simplesect.para: Refer UIC Error Codes in xufspsxc.h file.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is used to enable/disable Host Controller.

simplesect.para: XUFSPSXC_SUCCESS for Success XUFSPSXC_FAILURE for failure

briefdescription.para: This API Fill the transfer request descriptor for NOP-OUT UPIU.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.

briefdescription.para: This API Fill the transfer request descriptor for TEST UNIT READY Command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u64 Address, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillReadCmdUpiu

briefdescription.para: This API Fill the transfer request descriptor for READ Command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.
specifies the first logical block accessed by this command.
is the number of blocks to be read.
is a pointer to the destination data buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u64 Address, u32 BlkCnt, const u8 *Buff)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillWriteCmdUpiu

briefdescription.para: This API Fill the transfer request descriptor for WRITE Command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.
specifies the first logical block accessed by this command.
is the number of blocks to write.
is a pointer to the destination data buffer.

briefdescription.para: This API Fill the transfer request descriptor for READ/SET FLAG Command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.
is a flag to indicate whether the operation is read or write.
is a Flag Identification number.

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u32 Tsf_DW0, u32 IsRead, u32 Length)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillDescUpiu

briefdescription.para: This API Fill the transfer request descriptor for read or write Descriptor Command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.
contains information about Description identification Number(3rd byte), Index(2nd byte) and Selector(1st byte).
is a flag to indicate whether the operation is read or write descriptor.
is the number of bytes to read the descriptor.

memberdef.argsstring: (XUfsPsxc *InstancePtr, XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc *CmdDescPtr, u32 IsRead, u32 AttrIDn, u32 Value)
memberdef.name: XUfsPsxc_FillAttrUpiu

briefdescription.para: This API Fill the transfer request descriptor for read or write Attribute Command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.
is a flag to indicate whether the operation is read or write descriptor.
is a Attribute Identification number.
is value to be written to the attributes.

briefdescription.para: This API send the UPIU to the UFS device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_Xfer_CmdDesc instance.

simplesect.para: Refer OCS in xufspsxc.h file, XUFSPSXC_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This API does PHY Initialization sequence.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc_UicCmd instance.

briefdescription.para: This API Overrides the PHY rx_req.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUfsPsxc instance.
indicates PHY should be receiver mode or not
indicates Number of connected lanes
